invariants: fixture bytes enter the test browser as harness input, not through a CTOX HTTP business-data endpoint
both document and spreadsheet Office commits are dispatched through the real Business OS CommandBus
the CTOX daemon and native RxDB peer restart while the browser remains open
the terminal command is idempotent and creates no generic queue task
the browser receives the advanced document pointer and committed version over RxDB/WebRTC
Rust verifies the complete canonical blob before returning terminal success
document and spreadsheet commits also survive a complete native store reopen in the targeted Rust regression test
